data.title: Midtown Dental introduces FDA-cleared Detect AI for diagnostics, improving oral health identification. -101 characters
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 21, 2026, Midtown Dental Care Associates revealed the incorporation of Detect AI, developed by VideaHealth, into its diagnostic process. This FDA-approved AI technology will bolster the practice's capacity to detect oral health issues efficiently.

data.title: Brand Engagement Network secures $2.050 million AI licensing partnership in Africa, launching mental health pilot at Nelson Mandela University.
data.description: Nelson Mandela University in Johannesburg has launched a pilot program in partnership with Brand Engagement Network, Inc. (Nasdaq: BNAI) to provide institution-approved mental health services. The program, announced on January 21, 2026, aims to offer secure and regulated conversational AI solutions for students. BEN is known for its expertise in regulated industries, and this initiative marks a significant step towards improving mental health support on campus.

data.title: The Arab Energy Fund in MENA region approved for an onshore Panda Bond program, a first, in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, the Arab Energy Fund has achieved a significant milestone by becoming the first multilateral financial institution in the MENA (Middle East and North Africa) region to obtain regulatory approval. This approval signifies a key development in the region's financial landscape, emphasizing the fund's compliance with regulatory standards. The milestone underscores the fund's relevance and credibility in the financial sector.

data.title: U.S. Poison Centers save $3.1 billion annually by preventing costly ER visits and reducing hospitalizations - a new RAND study.
data.description: Every day, Poison Centers in the United States play a crucial role in preventing costly emergency room visits, reducing hospitalizations, and safeguarding families. A report released today reveals that these centers save an impressive $3.1 billion annually in medical expenses and lost productivity. This showcases the significant impact these centers have in terms of both cost savings and overall public health.

data.title: H.I.G. Bayside Capital Europe finishes Amerplast Group refinancing in Europe, part of H.I.G. Capital, managing $74 billion.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, H.I.G. Bayside Capital Europe, known as Bayside, a European affiliate focusing on special situations and capital solutions under H.I.G. Capital, a prominent global alternative investment firm managing a total capital of $74 billion, has shared its announcement.

data.title: Wesco International (NYSE:WCC) recognized in Fortune's AIQ50 list for top AI companies, 50 companies included.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, Wesco International, a prominent business-to-business distribution company (NYSE:WCC), has achieved recognition from Fortune Magazine as one of the first members of the AIQ50. This exclusive list highlights the top 50 companies that excel in providing logistics services and supply chain solutions.

data.title: Shawmut Design and Construction plans to expand into Mission Critical as part of strategy to reach $5 billion, currently at $2.3 billion.
data.description: Shawmut Design and Construction, based in Boston, reveals plans for rapid growth to reach $5 billion through strategic acquisitions and broadening operations in various industries and areas. The firm, currently valued at $2.3 billion, is making waves in the national construction management sector with its ambitious expansion strategy.

data.title: Walker & Dunlop secures $96.7M refinancing for three Class A Louisville properties, totaling 640 units.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, Walker & Dunlop, Inc. has facilitated $96.7 million in financing to recapitalize three new Class A residential properties comprising 640 units in Louisville, Kentucky. Through their Capital Markets division, Walker & Dunlop secured the refinancing for Highgates Group. Jonathan Zilber, Joel Chetner, and Josh Geller orchestrated three floating-rate, interest-only loans from an institutional lender. The loan proceeds are intended to retire existing debt and fund future growth.

data.title: Michelle Jacobi, a seasoned private markets professional with 15 years of experience, joins Oppenheimer as Managing Director in Global Fund Placement & Advisory Group.
data.description: Experienced individual with 15 years in the private markets sector joins Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. in New York on January 21, 2026. The professional holds expertise in private equity fundraising, GP seeding, stakes, and leveraged finance. Oppenheimer is a prominent investment bank and wealth management firm.

data.title: Saltbox Mgmt introduces S1, a new AI platform for Salesforce services, redefining delivery and positioning as AI-Enabled.
data.description: In Minneapolis on January 21, 2026, Saltbox Mgmt unveiled their new AI platform, Saltbox.One (S1), aiming to revolutionize the delivery of Salesforce services. This launch positions Saltbox Mgmt as a leading AI-Enabled Salesforce Services Company. S1 offers a comprehensive solution that surpasses the traditional approach, incorporating cutting-edge technology to enhance the services provided.

data.title: TE Connectivity reports Q1 FY2026 results: 22% sales growth ($4.7B), over 30% EPS growth. Exceeds guidance.
data.description: TE Connectivity plc, headquartered in Galway, Ireland, has surpassed expectations with a remarkable 22% increase in sales and over 30% growth in earnings per share compared to the previous year. Their financial report for the fiscal first quarter ending on Dec. 26, 2025, revealed net sales amounting to $4.7 billion. The company's performance highlights include significant growth in both sales and earnings, showcasing their strong market presence and financial stability.

data.title: Maple Leaf Foods to release Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on March 5, 2026, at 6:00 am ET. TSX: MFI.
data.description: Maple Leaf Foods Inc. (TSX: MFI) based in Mississauga, Ontario, announced that it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025 on March 5, 2026, at 6:00 am Eastern Time. Investors and stakeholders can expect detailed insights into the company's performance with this release.

data.title: Zum names Joseph Chong as CMO, a marketing leader with 25+ years of experience in tech, to modernize student transportation nationwide.
data.description: An experienced marketing leader with over 25 years of technology leadership expertise has joined the team at Zum, a prominent player in modern student transportation. The appointment of Joseph Chong was made public on January 21, 2026, in Redwood City, California. Chong is expected to contribute significantly to the nationwide efforts to modernize student transportation services.

data.title: Elissa Baker joins Nesa as President & Chief Clinical Officer to lead virtual care operations. MIAMI, Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: Epic Toolbox, a vendor for inpatient virtual care in 2026, has recently appointed a seasoned operator and clinician to oversee their expanded clinical and enterprise operations. Based in Miami, the company Nesa, known for providing industry-leading inpatient virtual care infrastructure, made this announcement on January 21, 2026. This move is expected to enhance their services and grow their operations significantly.

data.title: SCU offers online Ayurveda Short Courses, catering to the rising interest in health and wellness.
data.description: In Whittier, California, on January 21, 2026, Southern California University of Health Sciences unveiled the introduction of Ayurveda Short Courses to meet the increasing demand for integrative and preventive health practices. These courses are offered entirely online to cater to a broader audience.
